prestazioni: FA20 (4U-GSE) engine: Full forged internals with JE 9.5:1 compression pistons, Manley H-beam connecting rods, and a Tomei 264°/264° camshaft kit for optimized NA powerband (220+ whp on 93 octane).
Forced induction: Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold (Sparco) and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller (12 psi peak, 280 whp on E85).
Drivetrain: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2.2 final drive ratio), Cusco Type-RS 2-way clutch, and a TODA Racing lightweight flywheel (8.5 kg) for rapid rev matching.
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (Seibon).
Volk Racing TE37V (17x9.5 +35 front, 17x10.5 +40 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear) and Work Emotion CR Kiwami lug nuts.
Custom Rocket Bunny GT wing (Type 2) with adjustable carbon fiber mounts (9000 RPM) and a Varis Japan front lip spoiler (carbon fiber, 3-piece).
